sourcePrompt: A Vietnamese rural farmhouse, a single-story family home about eight meters wide - a step up from a hut. Plastered timber-framed walls in a warm earth tone, a clay-tile roof with gentle pitch, a covered veranda across the front on wooden posts sheltering the central doorway, and shuttered windows either side. Earthy plaster, dark timber. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
